member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.BasePlugin.AddComponent``1
member.summary: Add a Component (e.g. MonoBehaviour) into Unity scene. Automatically registers the type with Il2Cpp Type system if it isn't already.
member.typeparam: Type of the component to add.

member.name: T:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut
member.summary: A keyboard shortcut that can be used in Update method to check if user presses a key combo. The shortcut is only triggered when the user presses the exact combination. For example, F + LeftCtrl will trigger only if user presses and holds only LeftCtrl, and then presses F. If any other keys are pressed, the shortcut will not trigger. Can be used as a value of a setting in to allow user to change this shortcut and have the changes saved. How to use: Use in this class instead of in the Update loop.

member.name: F:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.Empty
member.summary: Shortcut that never triggers.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.#ctor(UnityEngine.KeyCode,UnityEngine.KeyCode[])
member.summary: Create a new keyboard shortcut.
member.param: Keys that should be held down before main key is registered

member.name: P:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.MainKey
member.summary: Main key of the key combination. It has to be pressed / let go last for the combination to be triggered. If the combination is empty, is returned.

member.name: P:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.Modifiers
member.summary: Modifiers of the key combination, if any.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.Deserialize(System.String)
member.summary: Attempt to deserialize key combination from the string.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.Serialize
member.summary: Serialize the key combination into a user readable string.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.IsDown
member.summary: Check if the main key was just pressed (Input.GetKeyDown), and specified modifier keys are all pressed

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.IsPressed
member.summary: Check if the main key is currently held down (Input.GetKey), and specified modifier keys are all pressed

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Configuration.KeyboardShortcut.IsUp
member.summary: Check if the main key was just lifted (Input.GetKeyUp), and specified modifier keys are all pressed.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.IL2CPPChainloader.AddUnityComponent``1
member.summary: Register and add a Unity Component (for example MonoBehaviour) into BepInEx global manager. Automatically registers the type with Il2Cpp type system if it isn't initialised already.
member.typeparam: Type of the component to add.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.IL2CPPChainloader.AddUnityComponent(System.Type)
member.summary: Register and add a Unity Component (for example MonoBehaviour) into BepInEx global manager. Automatically registers the type with Il2Cpp type system if it isn't initialised already.
member.param: Type of the component to add

member.name: E:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.IL2CPPChainloader.PluginLoad
member.summary: Occurs after a plugin is instantiated and just before is called.

member.name: T:BepInEx.UnityInput
member.summary: Abstraction layer over Unity's input systems for use in universal plugins that need to use hotkeys. It can use either Input or Unity.InputSystem, depending on what's available. Input is preferred. WARNING: Use only inside of Unity's main thread!

member.name: P:BepInEx.UnityInput.Current
member.summary: Best currently supported input system.

member.name: P:BepInEx.UnityInput.LegacyInputSystemAvailable
member.summary: True if the Input class is not disabled.

member.name: T:BepInEx.IInputSystem
member.summary: Generic input system interface. Just barely good enough for hotkeys.

member.name: P:BepInEx.IInputSystem.SupportedKeyCodes
member.summary: All KeyCodes supported by the current input system.

member.name: M:Doorstop.Entrypoint.Start
member.summary: The main entrypoint of BepInEx, called from Doorstop.
